title: [MTR4] 밥솥|Ricecooker trains
description: Resource pack that adds the Seoul Metro 2000 / 4000 series (4th/3rd batch) into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
**"Ricecooker" (밥솥)** is a nickname given to the Seoul Metro 2000 series (4th batch) and 4000 series (3rd batch).

The Seoul Metro 2000 series (4th batch) is a type of train that runs on Seoul Subway Line 2. A total of 21 10-car trains and 1 4-car train (for Seongsu branch) were produced by Hyundai Rotem in 2019-2020 to replace the older 2000 series (MELCO / GEC).  

The Seoul Metro 4000 series (3rd batch) is a type of train that runs on Seoul Subway Line 4. A total of 5 10-car trains were produced by Hyundai Rotem in 2020 to provide more services after the opening of the Jinjeop Line. 

These trains are designed by Büro Staubach.

# What will be in this pack?
### Seoul Metro 2000 series:
1. 4th batch
### Seoul Metro 4000 series:
1. 3rd batch

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Seoul Transportation Corporation.
